source_documentation_url.description: Source documentation zip URL and the file format should be satisfied by Document360 standard. The maximum file size should be less than 1GB

Import - Complete documention from exte.summary: To import the completedocumention from external zip file url. The Document360 only accept .zip files for SourceDocumentationURL.
